title: Public Data Hub Plan V2 — Required Infrastructure
status: REQUIRED — not optional. Must be built before first batch deploy.
purpose: The no-budget authority asset. Gives journalists, bloggers, and AI systems something to cite. Builds domain authority without backlinks.

section_1_loan_payment_tables.title: Personal Loan Payment Tables
section_1_loan_payment_tables.subtitle: Monthly payments for personal loans from $1,000 to $100,000 at rates from 5% to 30%
must_include: HTML data table with loan amounts × interest rates = monthly payment
Assumptions: fixed rate, no fees, standard amortization
Link to loan calculator: 'Calculate your exact payment'
Cite this data box with preformatted APA/MLA citations
Related pages: link to top 5 loan scenario pages

section_2_mortgage_affordability_tables.title: Mortgage Affordability Tables
section_2_mortgage_affordability_tables.subtitle: How much house you can afford at every salary level from $40K to $200K
must_include: HTML data table with salary × home price = affordable? (28% DTI rule)
Methodology: 28% front-end DTI, 6.5% rate, 20% down (or variable assumptions)
Assumptions: standard DTI ratio, fixed interest rate scenario, property tax estimate
Related pages: link to top 5 mortgage scenario pages

future_sections_add_when_ready: Compound Interest Growth Tables (after backup database activates)
Debt Payoff Strategy Comparison Tables (after held database activates)
Salary After Tax Tables (after held database activates, requires tax data verification)
Retirement Savings Reality Tables (after held database activates)

hub_page_structure.subtitle: Original data and reference tables for journalists, researchers, and personal finance readers. No signup required. All data calculated using standard financial formulas.
hub_page_structure.sections: 2 active sections (loan + mortgage). Future sections added as databases activate.
hub_page_structure.cite_section: How to cite QFINHUB data — preformatted APA, MLA, and Chicago citations for each table
hub_page_structure.methodology_page: Link to /data/methodology explaining all formulas and assumptions used
hub_page_structure.csv_downloads: Each table has a downloadable CSV file
hub_page_structure.last_updated: Auto-updated with each data asset publication

build_priority: BEFORE Batch 1 page deployment. The data hub establishes credibility BEFORE Google crawls database pages.
do_not_wait_for_backlinks: The data hub IS the authority signal. Build it now. Citations will come later if the data is useful.
verification: After build: verify HTTP 200, verify CSV downloads work, verify citations display correctly, verify mobile responsive.
